headline: 2 Reasons BKR is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since May 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 76.6%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Baker Hughes has surged 160% to $64.55 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 31.9% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 24.8%.

headline: New Strong Sell Stocks for May 13th
summary: AB, BKR and ASH have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on May 13th, 2026.
